text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus, I hear<n>some
excited voices.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Princess, that pose you did in the<n>paddock was
so cool! It was like you<n>were doing a special
move!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yes! You looked so confident and<n>beautiful! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Good eyes, you two! You always<n>know just
where to look.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That was my "Noblest of the Nobles"<n>pose. It's a
pose that shows off how<n>noble I am!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Noblest of the Nobles pose?! Holy<n>smokes! Even
the name is cool as<n>hell!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You got any other poses? I definitely<n>wanna see
more!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'd be happy to show you! I am a<n>princess of the
people, after all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Which would you like to see? The<n>"Mightiest of
the Mighty" pose or the<n>"Prettiest of the
Princesses" pose?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I mean, of course you should do the...

text_block_list.name: Vodka and Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Mightiest of the Mighty! Prettiest of<n>the
Princesses!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Scarlet, back off! I'm trying to<n>learn how to
get stronger here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me?! You back off first! I<n>want to learn
the ways of a princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, oh dear. What a pickle we're<n>in...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You over there! Perfect timing!<n>Would you
mind doing us the honor of<n>choosing a pose?
choice_data_list: Do the Prettiest of the Princesses pose.
Mightiest of the Mighty sounds good to me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Very well—then feast your eyes,<n>everyone! My
Prettiest of the<n>Princesses pose looks like... this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hooo ho ho ho!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the pose Shining Princess<n>strikes
whenever she's faced with<n>trouble!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Shining Princess is the hero of<n>Princess Fighter,
right? I loved that<n>show when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There are fewer things more<n>inspiring
than a plucky princess who<n>remembers to stay
graceful no matter<n>what comes her way. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Graceful no matter what... How<n>inspiring. I want
to be like that too—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
EEK! There's a bug on the ground<n>right by my
feet!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. Interrupting a conversation<n>between
maidens? You're quite the<n>little pest, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: And rude bugs deserve this... HYAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess feeds the bug a<n>knuckle
sandwich!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: WA-BAM!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That should do it. Consider our bug<n>problem
addressed.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now we're free to talk to our hearts'<n>content! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Incredible... I think this might be one<n>area where
I'm totally outmatched.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then feast your eyes on my<n>Mightiest of
the Mighty pose!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: HYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This is the pose Shining Princess<n>strikes
whenever she's whooped a<n>mighty foe!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Shining Princess is the hero of<n>Princess Fighter,
right? I loved that<n>show when I was a kid!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. There are fewer things more<n>inspiring
than a spirited princess who<n>stays brave no
matter what enemy<n>she faces. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! Such a powerful blow!<n>You're so cool!
Can you throw<n>another?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it would be my pleasure.<n>Aaand... HAH!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She throws out another mighty<n>punch... or so I
expect, but for some<n>reason her jab seems
distinctly<n>weaker than before.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hey now! That's no good at all,<n>Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Has praise made you complacent?<n>That punch
had no power behind it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! How could I make a foolof myself in public like this?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm a princess! I'm supposed to begraceful in all things! Oh, the shame!The embarrassment!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uh? What was so embarrassing?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Who knows?
